answer:
Cloudflare provides a Free plan for its developer platform, including Workers, Pages, KV, D1, and Durable Objects [1][2][3]. These services feature daily usage limits that, if exceeded, will result in errors or service suspension until the limits reset at 00:00 UTC [2][3]. The Workers Paid plan starts at $5 per month, offering higher usage allowances and removing hard limits [1][4].

Regarding developer API access, Cloudflare provides an alpha-stage endpoint for retrieving billing and usage data for self-serve accounts [5]. You can query usage data using the following endpoint [5]:

`GET /accounts/{account_id}/billable/usage`

This returns metered consumption data, including usage that falls within free-tier allowances [5]. Note that as an alpha resource, it is subject to change and may not yet display pricing fields for all accounts [5].

results.title: How charges accrue · Cloudflare Billing docs
